merge_notes.existing_quiz_status: Existing flat questions found in data/quiz/quiz_naeringsliv.json for fornebu_teknologipark: 5 questions. No separate set-file found.
merge_notes.kept: Kept useful core: former Oslo Airport Fornebu, first technology/headquarter buildings around 2002, IT/telecom/energy profile, Telenor as key anchor and environmental ambition.
merge_notes.corrected: Made 2002 precise as official Telenor opening on 23 September 2002 and move process from 26 November 2001. Replaced broad energy-neutral buildings with better documented green infrastructure, stormwater management and sustainable multi-use redevelopment. Clarified that Fornebu is in Bærum, while the airport served Oslo/Norway.
merge_notes.not_continued: Did not continue flat 5-question structure. Did not use generic questions or em_by_ prefix.
merge_notes.added: Added 5 sets x 6 questions with source-first anchors: airport 1939-1998, Telenor opening and Fornebu model, 6000/7500 employees, 140000 m², NOK 4.4bn, IT Fornebu, Terminalbygget, 42 500 m², Simula/Symantec/Alcatel/Abbott, Odd Nansen, preserved airport buildings and stormwater/green infrastructure.

signature_features: Fornebu model: IT/telecom-enabled flexible workplace and services
green infrastructure and stormwater management in redevelopment
must_include: keep former airport and Telenor anchor
correct 2002 as official Telenor opening rather than vague first buildings
